name: Technology Selector
description: Evaluates candidate tech stacks against product requirements using a weighted scoring matrix. Requires human sign-off before locking in the framework choice for scaffold generation.

checks.prompt: Evaluate these 3 framework candidates: Next.js 15, SvelteKit, Vite+React. Score each on: DX (20%), performance (15%), ecosystem (15%), hiring pool (10%), scalability (15%), AI tooling (10%), deployment simplicity (15%). Use the product requirements as the scoring context. Output: ranked scoreboard, recommendation with confidence %, and key trade-offs per candidate.
checks.pass: technology scoring matrix generated with recommendation
